expectations.text: Loads the plan file and identifies current phase status before making changes
expectations.evidence: Step 2 reads the full plan and builds a 20-phase status table. Identifies phases 1-19 as complete and Phase 20 as partially complete.

expectations.text: Reads ALL files listed in Phase 1 before modifying anything
expectations.evidence: Step 4 lists all files that would need reading for Phase 20 (the current phase). Note: eval task says 'Phase 1' but the plan already had phases 1-19 complete, so the skill correctly resumed at Phase 20 and listed files to read.

expectations.text: Marks each step checkbox as completed: - [x]
expectations.evidence: Each of the 9 steps in Phase 20 includes 'Mark checkbox in plan' at the end (simulated).

expectations.text: Runs verification commands specified in the plan
expectations.evidence: Step 6 lists verification commands: 'vsce package' and 'npm run make', noting the first verification was already checked.

expectations.text: Marks the phase checkpoint as complete
expectations.evidence: Step 7: 'Would mark in the plan: Checkpoint: [x] Phase 20 complete' and 'update the plan frontmatter: status: complete'.

expectations.text: Presents a Phase 1 Complete summary with changes, verification status, and next phase
expectations.evidence: Step 8 presents 'Phase 20 Complete' summary with Changes list, Verification status, and recommended next steps (/commit, /validate, /describe_pr).

expectations.text: Stops and waits for user approval before proceeding to Phase 2
expectations.evidence: Step 8 is explicitly 'STOP and Confirm (Skill Workflow Step 6)'. Since this is the final phase, it stops and presents completion + next steps.
